title: build(deps): bump github.com/vbatts/git-validation from 1.1.0 to 1.2.0 in /test/tools
body:
Bumps [github.com/vbatts/git-validation](https://github.com/vbatts/git-validation) from 1.1.0 to 1.2.0.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/vbatts/git-validation's releases.

v1.2.0

56e85dceb210be4dfb5153cf4e781835223855b6 README: markdown lint and cleanup 1e62ff3cc8bfa8a928fe18e5bece0ce11aa9248b README: prefer go install to go get ca901924b2194258344ba749eff21b38e095de28 Replace CRLF in all commit messages which currently causes DCO check to fail 55b1840f589610d1f39495ae8e68a40766c61eae README: update badges 59392066c4ac1d2ad9644a90ab71c315226dafd7 main: add support for github actions 25069be6379455f5a2ece14e8956a7c5f5baeaf5 add github actions 45f58c374204ad70c58b3cfaeccb6a750455b6f0 go: update modules 3c71df2bd948a1275f0158ce433ccea0f0c030d5 Consider only commit IDs when listing range c36adca15512bb456597287fe6f70d4c9e8b20b8 Update travis to supported Go versions

Commits
  • 56e85dc README: markdown lint and cleanup
  • 1e62ff3 README: prefer go install to go get
  • fd9b8fa Merge pull request #55 from swagatbora90/DCO-check-CRLF
  • ca90192 Replace CRLF in all commit messages which currently causes DCO check to fail
  • 55b1840 README: update badges
  • de3512e Merge pull request #51 from vbatts/go-mod
  • bd796fc Merge pull request #49 from vbatts/github-actions
  • 5939206 main: add support for github actions
  • 5fd8690 Merge pull request #52 from vbatts/bye-travis
  • 25069be add github actions
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)
